prompt: Create a sunlit anime-style travel illustration at Kitayuzawa Onsen, Shiroginu no Toko riverside promenade in a lush Japanese mountain hot-spring town. The scene shows exactly two young women walking side by side on a stone sidewalk beside a wooden riverside railing: the left figure is a transparent soap-slime girl with a hollow glassy body, thick iridescent bubble-like membrane skin, rainbow highlights, short translucent pearly hair, and a floating soap-bubble halo, wearing a sheer off-shoulder frilly white summer dress, sandals, and a small pale shoulder bag, with one hand resting on the railing; the right figure is a normal human young woman with long brown hair, wearing a cream blouse, a long blue-gray skirt, white sneakers, and carrying a black shoulder bag. Include exactly two shoulder bags, one pale bag on the slime girl and one black bag on the companion. Their faces are intentionally covered by soft rectangular beige blur masks, while the rest of the image is highly detailed. Behind them is a bright river with white rapids and rocks on the left, dense green forest, layered mountains, a vivid blue sky with puffy white clouds, and small roadside buildings on the right. Add exactly one dark roadside sign near the river reading 「北湯沢温泉」, 「白絹の床」, and small romanized text “Kita-Yuzawa Onsen / Shiroginu no Toko.” Use polished GPT-image anime realism, delicate linework, luminous summer lighting, dappled tree shadows, sparkling reflections on the slime body, and a peaceful sightseeing atmosphere. Aspect ratio 4:3.
